paymentMethods.name: SMBC Olive Gold
bestFor: Ordinary spending until 2026-08-31 because of 100万円修行
7-Eleven / Lawson / McDonald's / Saizeriya / Sukiya / Gusto / Doutor style SMBC対象店 when using smartphone Visa touch in Credit Mode
General fallback when no better campaign exists
avoidFor: JAL特約店 if I want JAL miles / LSP
Mobile Suica / PASMO / ICOCA / JAL Pay / au PAY / ANA Pay recharge for SMBC修行, because many of those do not count toward the 100万円 requirement
notes: Use Credit Mode smartphone touch for SMBC対象店.
For 100万円修行, safe-ish counted examples include ordinary card spending, PayPay, d払い, 楽天ペイ, Revolut, Amazon Gift Card purchase/charge.
Excluded examples include Mobile Suica/PASMO/ICOCA, JAL Pay, ANA Pay, au PAY, Kyash, VポイントPay, WAON/nanaco/Edy.

paymentMethods.name: JAL CLUB EST Suica
bestFor: JAL flights / JAL domestic tickets / JAL services
JALカード特約店 direct credit-card payment
JAL miles and JAL Life Status Points via shopping miles
Charging Mobile Suica for JRE POINT
avoidFor: Places where I need JCBタッチ; this card does not have ordinary JCB touch on the physical card
Suica charge if the goal is direct JAL shopping miles or LSP
JAL特約店 via Apple Pay / QUICPay / Suica unless that store explicitly supports it
notes: Direct credit-card payment usually earns JAL shopping miles.
JALカード特約店 direct payment is usually better for JAL miles.
Mobile Suica charge earns JRE POINT, not direct JAL shopping miles or LSP.
JRE POINT can later be converted to JAL miles.
Physical card can be used for JAL domestic Touch & Go boarding, separate from Suica/JCB touch.

paymentMethods.name: Mobile Suica
bestFor: stores that only accept transport IC
avoidFor: JAL特約店 when I want JAL特約店 miles
Spending where I need direct JAL shopping miles / LSP
notes: Recharge with JAL CLUB EST Suica / View card.
Good daily convenience route.
Use with JRE POINT barcode at atre.

paymentMethods.name: JP BANK EXTAGE JCB
bestFor: Amazon when JCB campaign is active
avoidFor: SMBC修行 spend
JAL特約店 where JAL card would be better
notes: Currently used to reload FamiPay.
Need to respect FamiPay recharge limits.

paymentMethods.name: FamiPay
avoidFor: Large spend because reload limits may be low
Non-FamilyMart unless a campaign is active
notes: Current route: JP BANK EXTAGE JCB -> FamiPay -> FamilyMart.
FamilyMart is no longer a JAL特約店, so do not prioritize JAL card there for 2x miles.

paymentMethods.name: PayPay Gold Visa
bestFor: Situations where 30万円 credit line matters
avoidFor: Costco / Mastercard-only, because this card is Visa
JAL特約店 if JAL miles/LSP is the goal
notes: Has LYP Premium included.
Annual fee is meaningful; review before renewal.
If annual spend reaches required threshold, annual points can offset annual fee.
Keep for now because LYP Premium is useful and credit line is 30万円.

paymentMethods.name: PayPay Card Mastercard ordinary
avoidFor: Large Costco purchases because credit line is only 3万円
notes: Credit line only 3万円.
Could request credit line increase later.

paymentMethods.name: JAL Pay
bestFor: Monthly JAL Pay charge route for possible JAL Life Status Point promotion
Alternative to PayPay Mastercard when limit is too low
avoidFor: JALカード特約店 where direct JAL card payment is better
Assuming JAL card -> JAL Pay charge earns normal JAL shopping miles
notes: JAL card charge to JAL Pay is not ordinary shopping-mile route.
Current special LSP route: monthly JAL card charge of 4万円 plus at least one JAL Pay Apple Pay / Google Pay payment may earn 1 LSP/month during the campaign period.
Use as first Mastercard-only prepaid option.

paymentMethods.name: au PAY
bestFor: Backup if JAL Pay does not work
avoidFor: JAL miles / LSP optimization
Assuming it is the best UQ mobile bill payment method by default
notes: au PAY Prepaid / virtual card can act as Mastercard route.
Useful with Ponta.
If I later get au PAY Card, UQ mobile bill payment may become better with au PAY Card.

paymentMethods.name: ANA Pay
avoidFor: Main strategy, because my main airline route is currently JAL, not ANA
Mastercard-only situations
notes: Keep as backup.
Not my main mileage ecosystem.

paymentMethods.name: TOYOTA Wallet
avoidFor: Main strategy
notes: Potential experimental chain: JAL Pay -> au PAY -> ANA Pay -> TOYOTA Wallet.
This route may stop working anytime.
Test only with small amounts.

paymentMethods.name: JRE POINT
avoidFor: Assuming direct JAL LSP
notes: At atre, show JRE POINT barcode first, then pay.
Can be used as JAL miles buffer before converting.

paymentMethods.name: Ponta
bestFor: Life / Lawson / Ponta stores when applicable
avoidFor: Replacing payment-card optimization
notes: Often should be scanned before payment.
Payment method should still be selected separately.

paymentMethods.name: MUJI App / MUJI GOOD PROGRAM
avoidFor: Payment optimization by itself
notes: At MUJI, scan MUJI app first.
If inside atre, scan JRE POINT too.

paymentMethods.name: LaCuCa / Life app
avoidFor: Payment optimization by itself
notes: At Life, scan LaCuCa / Life app first, then pay with best card/wallet.

merchants.name: FamilyMart
merchants.defaultRecommendation: JP BANK EXTAGE JCB -> FamiPay -> pay with FamiPay
merchants.duringSmbcTrainingRecommendation: Still use FamiPay if campaign / normal small spend. Use SMBC only if trying to push real spending and no FamiPay/JCB benefit matters.
merchants.afterSmbcTrainingRecommendation: FamiPay remains default.
steps: Reload FamiPay with JP BANK EXTAGE JCB.
At checkout say: FamiPayでお願いします
alternatives: SMBC Olive Gold if no FamiPay balance and I want to count spending.
warnings: FamilyMart is no longer a JAL特約店.
Do not use JAL card expecting 2x特約店 miles.
FamiPay reload limits may apply.

merchants.name: 7-Eleven
merchants.defaultRecommendation: SMBC Olive Gold Credit Mode via smartphone Visa touch
merchants.duringSmbcTrainingRecommendation: SMBC Olive Gold Credit Mode smartphone Visa touch
merchants.afterSmbcTrainingRecommendation: Continue SMBC smartphone touch if it remains high-rate. If JP BANK JCB campaign is higher, use JP BANK JCB temporarily.
steps: Scan 7-Eleven app if relevant.
Say: Visaのタッチでお願いします
Use smartphone touch with SMBC Olive in Credit Mode.
alternatives: JP BANK EXTAGE JCB only when there is a stronger campaign.
warnings: Physical card touch / iD / insert payment may not count for the high SMBC rate.
Confirm current campaign before overriding.

merchants.name: atre
merchants.defaultRecommendation: JRE POINT barcode + Mobile Suica
merchants.duringSmbcTrainingRecommendation: Still Mobile Suica for station convenience unless making a large purchase where SMBC修行 matters more.
merchants.afterSmbcTrainingRecommendation: JRE POINT barcode + Mobile Suica remains default.
steps: Show JRE POINT barcode.
Say: JRE POINTお願いします。支払いはSuicaで。
Pay with Mobile Suica.
alternatives: If store is a clear JAL特約店, direct JAL card may be better.
warnings: Mobile Suica charge earns JRE POINT, not direct JAL shopping miles/LSP.

merchants.name: MUJI inside atre
merchants.defaultRecommendation: MUJI App + JRE POINT barcode + Mobile Suica
merchants.duringSmbcTrainingRecommendation: MUJI App + JRE POINT barcode + Mobile Suica unless a large SMBC修行 purchase matters more.
merchants.afterSmbcTrainingRecommendation: MUJI App + JRE POINT barcode + Mobile Suica remains default.
steps: Show MUJI app membership barcode.
Show JRE POINT barcode.
Say: 支払いはSuicaでお願いします
Pay with Mobile Suica.
alternatives: If a specific credit card campaign beats this, override manually.
warnings: Do not assume direct JAL card is better here unless special campaign exists.

merchants.name: 三田製麺所
merchants.defaultRecommendation: During SMBC修行: SMBC Olive Gold. After SMBC修行: Mobile Suica for convenience, or JAL card direct if wanting JAL/LSP.
merchants.duringSmbcTrainingRecommendation: SMBC Olive Gold if credit card is accepted.
merchants.afterSmbcTrainingRecommendation: Mobile Suica for convenience, or JAL card direct if wanting JAL/LSP.
steps: If paying by card: クレジットでお願いします
If paying by Suica: Suicaでお願いします
alternatives: PayPay if coupon exists.
JAL card direct if trying to collect JAL shopping miles/LSP.
warnings: Not a known JAL特約店.
Not a known SMBC high-rate restaurant.
Payment methods may vary by branch.

merchants.name: 元祖油堂
merchants.defaultRecommendation: Mobile Suica
merchants.duringSmbcTrainingRecommendation: Use SMBC if the branch supports credit card and I want to count spend. Otherwise Mobile Suica.
merchants.afterSmbcTrainingRecommendation: Mobile Suica remains default. JAL card direct if credit card accepted and I want JAL/LSP.
steps: At ticket machine / cashier, use transport IC if available.
Say: Suicaでお願いします
alternatives: PayPay if coupon exists.
SMBC during training if credit card accepted.
warnings: Payment methods vary by branch.
Ticket machine may make Suica easiest.

merchants.name: Life Supermarket
merchants.defaultRecommendation: LaCuCa / Life app + best payment method
merchants.duringSmbcTrainingRecommendation: LaCuCa / Life app + SMBC Olive Gold
merchants.afterSmbcTrainingRecommendation: LaCuCa / Life app + best current campaign. Options: PayPay / d払い / au PAY / 楽天ペイ / JAL card / SMBC.
steps: Show LaCuCa / Life app.
Say: クレジットでお願いします for SMBC/JAL.
Or say the QR payment name if using PayPay/d払い/au PAY/楽天ペイ.
alternatives: Use PayPay/d払い/au PAY/楽天ペイ if campaign is better.
Use JAL card direct if focusing on JAL/LSP after SMBC training.
warnings: LaCuCa is a membership/point layer. Payment method is separate.
Do not open a new Life credit card unless monthly Life spend is large.
Life supports several point-card layers, but one transaction cannot combine LaCuCa / LC JCB / Ponta / d POINT point cards together.

Life smartphone payments and LaCuCa electronic money/credit-card payment combinations may have restrictions; treat LaCuCa/Life app as a point/coupon layer unless intentionally using LaCuCa electronic money.
aliases: ライフコーポレーション

merchants.name: Maruman Supermarket / マルマンストア
merchants.defaultRecommendation: During SMBC修行: SMBC Olive Gold. After SMBC修行: JAL card direct for JAL/LSP, Mobile Suica for small quick purchases, or best QR campaign.
merchants.duringSmbcTrainingRecommendation: SMBC Olive Gold direct unless a QR campaign clearly beats the修行 value.
merchants.afterSmbcTrainingRecommendation: JAL CLUB EST Suica direct if I want JAL/LSP; Mobile Suica for speed; PayPay/d払い/楽天ペイ/au PAY if campaign is strong.
steps: Say: クレジットでお願いします for SMBC/JAL.
Say: Suicaでお願いします for quick small purchases.
Say PayPayで, d払いで, 楽天ペイで, au PAYで, etc. when using QR campaign.
alternatives: Mobile Suica for small quick purchases.
PayPay/d払い/楽天ペイ/au PAY/ANA Pay if campaign is strong and accepted.
JAL card direct after SMBC修行 if focusing on JAL shopping miles/LSP.
warnings: Not a known JAL特約店.
Maruman supports many cashless methods, so choose based on current campaign or current goal.
Do not over-optimize small grocery trips; SMBC during修行 or Mobile Suica for speed is fine.
aliases: マルマン スーパー

merchants.name: JAL flights / JAL domestic tickets
merchants.defaultRecommendation: JAL CLUB EST Suica direct credit-card payment
merchants.duringSmbcTrainingRecommendation: JAL CLUB EST Suica direct credit-card payment remains preferred.
merchants.afterSmbcTrainingRecommendation: JAL CLUB EST Suica direct credit-card payment remains preferred.
steps: Log into JMB before booking.
Confirm JMB number is attached.
Pay with JAL CLUB EST Suica.
For domestic JAL, physical JAL card may be usable for Touch & Go boarding.
alternatives: Use JAL Pay only when it is specifically better for overseas / prepaid / campaign context.
warnings: JAL Touch & Go is not Suica/JCB touch. It is JAL IC/JMB identity.

merchants.name: JALカード特約店 general
merchants.defaultRecommendation: JAL CLUB EST Suica physical card direct credit-card payment
merchants.duringSmbcTrainingRecommendation: Use JAL CLUB EST Suica direct if JAL miles/LSP matter more than SMBC修行 progress.
merchants.afterSmbcTrainingRecommendation: JAL CLUB EST Suica physical card direct credit-card payment.
steps: Say: クレジットでお願いします.
Use physical card / ordinary credit-card payment.
alternatives: Do not use Apple Pay / QUICPay / Suica unless that specific merchant explicitly supports特約店 miles via that route.
warnings: Direct card payment matters.
Apple Pay / QUICPay / QR may not receive特約店 miles.
examples: マツキヨ / ココカラ

merchants.name: Amazon.co.jp
merchants.defaultRecommendation: JP BANK EXTAGE JCB if JCB campaign is active. SMBC Olive Gold if during SMBC修行 and needing counted spend.
merchants.duringSmbcTrainingRecommendation: SMBC Olive Gold or Amazon Gift Card charge if filling the SMBC修行 gap.
merchants.afterSmbcTrainingRecommendation: JP BANK EXTAGE JCB when JCB campaign is active.
steps: Choose the active best card in Amazon checkout.
alternatives: Amazon Gift Card charge with SMBC can be used to safely fill SMBC修行 gap.
warnings: Do not lock too much money in Amazon Gift Card unless I will use it.
JCB campaign rules should be checked before large purchases.

merchants.name: Yahoo!ショッピング / LOHACO
merchants.defaultRecommendation: PayPay Gold / PayPay Credit
merchants.duringSmbcTrainingRecommendation: PayPay Gold / PayPay Credit unless SMBC修行 progress is more important than PayPay ecosystem value.
merchants.afterSmbcTrainingRecommendation: PayPay Gold / PayPay Credit
steps: Use PayPay ecosystem payment.
alternatives: Use other cards only if a specific campaign beats PayPay.
warnings: PayPay Gold value depends on LYP, Yahoo/LOHACO usage, and annual fee math.

merchants.name: Costco Japan
merchants.defaultRecommendation: JAL Pay first test. au PAY Prepaid backup. PayPay ordinary Mastercard only for small purchases due to 3万円 line.
merchants.duringSmbcTrainingRecommendation: Mastercard-only route still applies: JAL Pay -> au PAY Prepaid -> PayPay ordinary Mastercard if small.
merchants.afterSmbcTrainingRecommendation: JAL Pay first test. au PAY Prepaid backup. Consider Costco Global Card if spend becomes frequent/large.
steps: Try small transaction first.
Say: Mastercardのタッチでお願いします
Use Apple Pay JAL Pay if accepted.
alternatives: au PAY Prepaid Mastercard
Cash
Costco Global Card if Costco spend becomes frequent/large
warnings: PayPay Gold is Visa, so not suitable.
PayPay ordinary Mastercard has only 3万円 limit.
Prepaid/contactless acceptance should be tested before large purchase.

merchants.name: UQ mobile bill
merchants.defaultRecommendation: If I have au PAY Card and plan is eligible for payment discount, use au PAY Card. If I do not have au PAY Card, use SMBC Olive Gold during SMBC修行.
merchants.duringSmbcTrainingRecommendation: SMBC Olive Gold if no au PAY Card discount applies.
merchants.afterSmbcTrainingRecommendation: Re-evaluate based on whether au PAY Card exists and whether discount applies.
steps: Set the best eligible payment method in UQ mobile billing settings.
alternatives: JAL card if focusing on JAL/LSP and no au PAY Card discount.
warnings: au PAY balance payment is not automatically best.
UQ monthly payment is a stable spend source for SMBC修行.

merchants.name: KALDI Coffee Farm
merchants.defaultRecommendation: Do not use KALDI Card/app because I do not currently have it. During SMBC修行, use SMBC Olive Gold if credit card is accepted; if inside atre/station or payment is easier by transport IC, use Mobile Suica.
merchants.duringSmbcTrainingRecommendation: SMBC Olive Gold direct when credit card is accepted and I want counted ordinary spend. Mobile Suica if the branch/shopping facility is Suica-friendly or the amount is small.
merchants.afterSmbcTrainingRecommendation: Mobile Suica for convenience, or JAL CLUB EST Suica direct if I want ordinary JAL shopping miles/LSP and credit card is accepted. Use PayPay/QR only when that branch supports it and a campaign is active.
steps: If paying by Suica: say Suicaでお願いします.
If paying by card: say クレジットでお願いします.
If inside atre and available, show JRE POINT before payment.
alternatives: KALDI online / JAL Mall route if the exact item is available and I specifically want JAL Mall miles.
PayPay/QR only if the branch or shopping facility supports it and a campaign is active.
warnings: KALDI official FAQ says debit, e-money, and code payment support differs by store/shopping facility.
Do not recommend KALDI Card/app by default because I do not currently have it.
Do not assume KALDI is a JALカード特約店 in physical stores.
aliases: カルディコーヒーファーム

merchants.name: Lawson
merchants.defaultRecommendation: Ponta or d POINT barcode + SMBC Olive Gold Credit Mode smartphone Visa touch.
merchants.duringSmbcTrainingRecommendation: Ponta/d POINT + SMBC Olive Gold Credit Mode smartphone Visa touch.
merchants.afterSmbcTrainingRecommendation: Continue SMBC smartphone touch while it remains a high-rate target store; otherwise use Ponta/d POINT + campaign-best payment.

Say: Visaのタッチでお願いします.
Use smartphone touch with SMBC Olive in Credit Mode.
alternatives: PayPay/d払い/au PAY if a coupon/campaign beats SMBC.
Mobile Suica for fastest small payments when points are not worth thinking about.
warnings: Physical card touch / iD / insert payment may not count for the high SMBC rate.
Campaign and target-store rules should be rechecked before large recurring use.

merchants.duringSmbcTrainingRecommendation: SMBC Olive Gold Credit Mode smartphone Visa touch.
merchants.afterSmbcTrainingRecommendation: Continue SMBC smartphone touch while it remains high-rate; use app coupons/mobile order when better.

If paying in store, say: Visaのタッチでお願いします.
Use smartphone touch with SMBC Olive in Credit Mode.
alternatives: Mobile order campaign or PayPay/coupon route if currently stronger.
Mobile Suica only if speed matters more than points.
warnings: Physical card touch / iD / insert payment may not count for the high SMBC rate.

merchants.duringSmbcTrainingRecommendation: SMBC Olive Gold Credit Mode smartphone Visa touch.
merchants.afterSmbcTrainingRecommendation: Continue SMBC smartphone touch while it remains high-rate.
steps: Say: Visaのタッチでお願いします.
Use smartphone touch with SMBC Olive in Credit Mode.
alternatives: Mobile Suica for speed if accepted and points are not important.

merchants.duringSmbcTrainingRecommendation: SMBC Olive Gold Credit Mode smartphone Visa touch.
merchants.afterSmbcTrainingRecommendation: Continue SMBC smartphone touch while it remains high-rate.
steps: Say: Visaのタッチでお願いします.
Use smartphone touch with SMBC Olive in Credit Mode.
alternatives: PayPay/d払い/楽天ペイ/au PAY only when a coupon/campaign beats SMBC.
Mobile Suica for fastest low-friction payment.
warnings: Physical card touch / iD / insert payment may not count for the high SMBC rate.

merchants.name: Gusto
merchants.defaultRecommendation: SMBC Olive Gold Credit Mode smartphone Visa touch.
merchants.duringSmbcTrainingRecommendation: SMBC Olive Gold Credit Mode smartphone Visa touch.
merchants.afterSmbcTrainingRecommendation: Continue SMBC smartphone touch while it remains high-rate; use app coupons when better.

Say: Visaのタッチでお願いします.
Use smartphone touch with SMBC Olive in Credit Mode.
alternatives: PayPay/QR campaign if stronger.
JAL card direct only if I specifically prefer ordinary JAL miles over SMBC high-rate.

merchants.name: Doutor

merchants.duringSmbcTrainingRecommendation: SMBC Olive Gold Credit Mode smartphone Visa touch.

alternatives: Doutor app/card if a specific campaign makes it better.
Mobile Suica for quick coffee when you do not want to think.

merchants.name: マツキヨ / ココカラファイン
merchants.defaultRecommendation: Store app/point layer first, then JAL CLUB EST Suica direct credit-card payment.

merchants.afterSmbcTrainingRecommendation: JAL CLUB EST Suica direct credit-card payment.

merchants.name: Welcia / ウエルシア

merchants.duringSmbcTrainingRecommendation: Use JAL CLUB EST Suica direct if JAL特約店 miles/LSP matter; use SMBC only if SMBC修行 progress is more important.
merchants.afterSmbcTrainingRecommendation: JAL CLUB EST Suica direct credit-card payment.

PayPay/QR only when coupon/campaign is stronger.

merchants.name: AEON / まいばすけっと / MaxValu eligible AEON group
merchants.defaultRecommendation: JAL CLUB EST Suica direct credit-card payment if the specific AEON group store is JAL特約店 eligible.

merchants.afterSmbcTrainingRecommendation: JAL CLUB EST Suica direct credit-card payment when eligible.

Pay with JAL CLUB EST Suica direct.
alternatives: Mobile Suica for very small purchases if accepted and speed matters.
SMBC during training if you choose 修行 progress over JAL特約店.

merchants.name: Nojima
merchants.defaultRecommendation: JAL CLUB EST Suica direct credit-card payment for eligible physical Nojima stores.
merchants.duringSmbcTrainingRecommendation: Use JAL direct for JAL特約店 miles/LSP unless SMBC修行 progress is more important.
merchants.afterSmbcTrainingRecommendation: JAL CLUB EST Suica direct credit-card payment.
steps: Say: クレジットでお願いします.
Pay with JAL CLUB EST Suica direct.
alternatives: If buying online, check whether a JAL Mall/JAL Mileage Park route is better.
Compare final price, store points, and warranty before optimizing miles.

Monthly telecom/internet fees and some services may not qualify.

merchants.name: Royal Host
merchants.defaultRecommendation: JAL CLUB EST Suica direct credit-card payment.
merchants.duringSmbcTrainingRecommendation: Use JAL direct if JAL特約店 miles/LSP matter; use SMBC only if 修行 progress is more important.
merchants.afterSmbcTrainingRecommendation: JAL CLUB EST Suica direct credit-card payment.
steps: Say: クレジットでお願いします.
Pay with JAL CLUB EST Suica direct.
alternatives: SMBC during training if you choose 修行 progress over JAL特約店.
Use restaurant coupons if they beat miles value.
warnings: Prefer direct credit-card route for JAL特約店 strategy.
Check branch/campaign conditions before large group bills.

merchants.name: Starbucks Japan
merchants.defaultRecommendation: During SMBC修行: SMBC Olive Gold if paying directly. Otherwise Starbucks app/card when a Starbucks campaign or stored balance exists. Mobile Suica for quick small payments.
merchants.duringSmbcTrainingRecommendation: SMBC Olive Gold direct if I want counted spend and no Starbucks-specific campaign is better.
merchants.afterSmbcTrainingRecommendation: Starbucks app/card for Starbucks-specific rewards/campaigns; otherwise Mobile Suica for speed or JAL card direct for ordinary JAL miles.
steps: If using Starbucks app/card, scan the Starbucks app.
If paying directly by card, say: クレジットでお願いします.
If paying by Suica, say: Suicaでお願いします.
alternatives: Mobile order/app campaign route if available.
PayPay/QR only if that branch/campaign supports it.
warnings: Not a known JAL特約店 or SMBC high-rate target in this data.
Starbucks app/card balance can lock funds into Starbucks.

merchants.name: Don Quijote / ドン・キホーテ
merchants.defaultRecommendation: During SMBC修行: SMBC Olive Gold direct unless majica/coupon route is better. After SMBC修行: use majica/app/coupon if better; otherwise JAL card direct for ordinary JAL miles or SMBC/general card.
merchants.duringSmbcTrainingRecommendation: SMBC Olive Gold direct for ordinary counted spend, unless a Donki/majica coupon is clearly better.
merchants.afterSmbcTrainingRecommendation: Use majica/app/coupon when better; otherwise choose JAL card direct for ordinary JAL miles or current campaign-best payment.
steps: Open majica app/coupon if using one.
Say the chosen payment route: クレジットでお願いします / Suicaで / PayPayで.
alternatives: PayPay/QR if coupon exists.
Mobile Suica for small quick purchases if accepted.
warnings: Donki is campaign/coupon-driven; do not hard-code one permanent best payment.
Check branch acceptance and app coupon conditions.

merchants.name: UNIQLO
merchants.defaultRecommendation: During SMBC修行: SMBC Olive Gold direct. After SMBC修行: JAL card direct for ordinary JAL miles, or campaign-best payment.
merchants.duringSmbcTrainingRecommendation: SMBC Olive Gold direct for counted ordinary spend.
merchants.afterSmbcTrainingRecommendation: JAL CLUB EST Suica direct if I want ordinary JAL shopping miles; otherwise use campaign-best payment.
steps: Scan UNIQLO app membership barcode if relevant.
Say: クレジットでお願いします.
Pay with SMBC during 修行 or JAL after 修行 depending on goal.
alternatives: Online/app payment campaign if stronger.
Mobile Suica only if accepted and convenience beats optimization.
warnings: Not a known JAL特約店 in this data.
Campaigns can override the default.

merchants.name: Gyomu Super / 業務スーパー
merchants.defaultRecommendation: During SMBC修行: SMBC Olive Gold if the branch accepts credit card. After SMBC修行: JAL card direct if credit accepted and I want ordinary JAL miles; otherwise cash/available payment.
merchants.duringSmbcTrainingRecommendation: SMBC Olive Gold if credit card is accepted by the branch.
merchants.afterSmbcTrainingRecommendation: JAL card direct for ordinary JAL miles if credit accepted; otherwise use the branch's available payment method.
steps: Check the branch payment labels/register.
If credit accepted, say: クレジットでお願いします.
alternatives: Cash if branch is cash-heavy.
Mobile Suica/QR only if the branch supports it.
warnings: Payment acceptance varies heavily by branch/franchise.
Do not assume all branches accept credit card or e-money.

merchants.name: Bic Camera / Yodobashi Camera
merchants.defaultRecommendation: During SMBC修行: SMBC Olive Gold if no better store/campaign route. After SMBC修行: compare store points, price, JAL Mall/JAL Mileage Park route, and card benefits before deciding.
merchants.duringSmbcTrainingRecommendation: SMBC Olive Gold for counted spend unless store/campaign points are clearly better.
merchants.afterSmbcTrainingRecommendation: Choose based on final net value: store points + campaign + JAL Mall/JAL Mileage Park if online.
steps: Compare cash/card/store point differences before paying.
If using credit card, say: クレジットでお願いします.
alternatives: Nojima with JALカード特約店 may be better if price is similar.
JAL Mall/JAL Mileage Park online route if available.
warnings: Electronics stores often change point rates depending on payment method.
Do not optimize only miles; compare final price and warranty.

merchants.name: Maruetsu Petit / マルエツ プチ
merchants.defaultRecommendation: During SMBC修行: SMBC Olive Gold direct if ordinary grocery spend matters. After SMBC修行: JAL card direct for JAL/LSP, or PayPay/AEON Pay/credit/Suica based on campaign and convenience.
merchants.duringSmbcTrainingRecommendation: SMBC Olive Gold direct for ordinary grocery spend. Use PayPay/AEON Pay only if a campaign clearly beats the修行 value.
merchants.afterSmbcTrainingRecommendation: JAL CLUB EST Suica direct if I want JAL/LSP; Mobile Suica for small quick purchases if accepted; PayPay/AEON Pay if campaign is strong.
steps: If paying by card: say クレジットでお願いします.
If using PayPay/AEON Pay: say PayPayで / AEON Payでお願いします.
If using transport IC where accepted: say Suicaでお願いします.
alternatives: PayPay or AEON Pay when a campaign is active.
Mobile Suica for small quick purchases if accepted at that branch.
Consider AEON/Maruetsu-related routes only if I later open a relevant AEON/Maruetsu card.
warnings: Maruetsu official FAQ says credit card, PayPay, and AEON Pay are available; e-money and smartphone payment availability may be branch/service dependent.
Not treated as a JALカード特約店 by default.
If this is inside a station/shopping facility, payment acceptance may follow facility rules.

merchants.name: Niku no Hanamasa / 肉のハナマサ
merchants.defaultRecommendation: During SMBC修行: SMBC Olive Gold direct if credit card is accepted. After SMBC修行: JAL card direct for ordinary JAL/LSP, or Mobile Suica / iD / QUICPay if faster and accepted.
merchants.duringSmbcTrainingRecommendation: SMBC Olive Gold direct if credit card is accepted. If the branch only has e-money/contactless and the amount is small, Mobile Suica is acceptable.
merchants.afterSmbcTrainingRecommendation: JAL CLUB EST Suica direct if I want JAL/LSP and credit card is accepted; Mobile Suica/iD/QUICPay for speed if accepted.
steps: If paying by card: say クレジットでお願いします.
If paying by Suica: say Suicaでお願いします.
If using iD/QUICPay: say iDで / QUICPayでお願いします.
alternatives: Mobile Suica for small quick purchases where accepted.
JAL Pay / au PAY Mastercard prepaid only if the branch accepts Mastercard and I need that route.
PayPay/QR only if the specific branch supports it; do not assume QR is available everywhere.
warnings: Assumed to be the '牛头店' mentioned by the user; if the user meant 牛角, use the Gyukaku rule instead.
Payment support varies by branch; some Hanamasa branch pages list credit cards and Suica/PASMO/QUICPay/iD/Rakuten Edy, while not all QR payments are guaranteed.
Not a known JALカード特約店.

merchants.name: Gyu-Kaku / 牛角
merchants.defaultRecommendation: During SMBC修行: SMBC Olive Gold if credit card is accepted. After SMBC修行: PayPay/d払い/楽天ペイ/au PAY when coupons/campaigns are active; otherwise JAL card direct for ordinary JAL/LSP.
merchants.duringSmbcTrainingRecommendation: SMBC Olive Gold if card payment is accepted; use QR payment only if a coupon/campaign is clearly better.
merchants.afterSmbcTrainingRecommendation: Use QR payment when coupon/campaign exists; otherwise JAL CLUB EST Suica direct if I want JAL/LSP or SMBC as fallback.
steps: Check the 牛角 app/coupon first.
If paying by card: say クレジットでお願いします.
If using QR: say PayPayで / d払いで / 楽天ペイで / au PAYでお願いします.
alternatives: PayPay/d払い/楽天ペイ/au PAY when campaign/coupon is active.
JAL card direct after SMBC修行 if focusing on JAL/LSP.
JAL Pay/au PAY prepaid if Mastercard route is useful and accepted.
warnings: This is included in case '牛头店' meant 牛角 rather than 肉のハナマサ.
Reins/Colowide payment support can be branch-dependent; confirm at the branch for card/QR/e-money acceptance.
Not treated as a SMBC high-rate target restaurant by default.
